headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' cdnjs.cloudflare.com *.google.com *.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' fonts.googleapis.com cdnjs.cloudflare.com; font-src 'self' fonts.gstatic.com cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: *.google.com *.gstatic.com cdnjs.cloudflare.com openweathermap.org; connect-src 'self' *.supabase.co earthquake.usgs.gov *.openstreetmap.org *.overpass-api.de api.bigdatacloud.net *.open-meteo.com www.gdacs.org api.allorigins.win api.codetabs.com *.imd.gov.in router.project-osrm.org raw.githubusercontent.com; frame-src 'self' *.google.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';
